creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Thank you, Kirk.


(In reply to Graham Perrin ◐ from comment #2)

> … If I can enhance the PDF to reach the larger versions of images that 
> remain on the FreeBSD Project website, I will. …

<https://people.freebsd.org/~grahamperrin/273360/273360-hacked-for-images.pdf> (2023-Aug-26 16:44) was the result of that enhancement, however I don't treat it as complete. 

I am temporarily unable to access freefall, to complete the work.
